name: RecruitingStatus
title: DRKS Recruiting Status
description: Recruitment status codes describing the current state of participant recruitment for a study registered in the DRKS.

concept.definition: The study is actively recruiting participants.
Recruitment is restricted to participants who have been specifically invited.
Recruitment is complete, but follow-up of enrolled participants is still ongoing.
Recruitment and follow-up of all participants are both complete.
The study has been permanently stopped before completion.
The study was withdrawn before any participants were enrolled.
